theme_and_archetype.theme: Dark Theme (Core Charcoal/Black with isolated pure white product panels)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: High energy club, premium, unapologetically Malaysian (Manglish)

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-9xl font-heading uppercase tracking-tighter text-white drop-shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,240,255,0.6)]
hierarchy.h2_section: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-heading uppercase tracking-tight
hierarchy.section_label: text-sm font-body uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-[#FFD700] mb-4 block

headlines: Top quality drinks dengan harga best!

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-12

hero.description: Full-bleed background image with heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/80 to bg-transparent). Massive glowing text.
hero.wrapper_classes: relative w-full h-[90vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center bg-black overflow-hidden
hero.overlay_classes: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/80 via-black/40 to-[#050505] z-10

buttons.hot_pink_pill: bg-[#FF007F] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-heading text-2xl uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#E60073] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,0,127,0.6)] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 sm:p-5 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(37,211,102,0.6)] transition-all z-50 flex items-center justify-center text-3xl sm:text-4xl

product_card.description: White panel card to contrast heavily with the black background.
product_card.wrapper_classes: bg-white text-[#050505] rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] transition-all p-5 flex flex-col border-4 border-transparent hover:border-[#00F0FF]/30
product_card.image_wrapper: w-full aspect-square bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl mb-4 overflow-hidden relative

category_tiles.description: Asymmetric bento grid. Images have dark overlays. Category names in massive Bebas Neue text.
category_tiles.wrapper_classes: relative rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden group min-h-[300px] md:min-h-[400px] flex items-end p-8 border border-white/10 hover:border-[#39FF14]/50 transition-colors
category_tiles.text_classes: relative z-20 text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-heading uppercase text-white group-hover:text-[#39FF14] transition-colors drop-shadow-lg

flash_sale_strip.description: Scrolling marquee or full width banner with high energy.
flash_sale_strip.wrapper_classes: w-full bg-[#39FF14] text-black font-heading text-3xl uppercase tracking-widest py-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-8 overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)]

stats_row.wrapper_classes: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 border-y border-white/10 py-16 my-16 text-center
stats_row.label_classes: text-sm font-body text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold

tier_cards.description: Cards for Regular, Gold, Platinum rewards.
tier_cards.wrapper_classes: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-[2rem] p-8 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col

checkout_whatsapp_redirect.description: Screen showing staff assignment and big WhatsApp button.
checkout_whatsapp_redirect.wrapper_classes: max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#121212] rounded-[2rem] p-10 border border-[#25D366]/40 text-center text-white mt-20 shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(37,211,102,0.15)]

iconography.forbidden: lucide-react (DO NOT USE under any circumstance)

testing.attributes: Every interactive element MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='add-to-cart-lah', data-testid='whatsapp-float')

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject fonts via index.html or index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap');
Define custom colors in tailwind.config.js or via CSS variables in index.css.
The UI is primarily Dark Mode (#050505), but Product Cards MUST be pure white (#FFFFFF) for high contrast and to satisfy the 'dark black and white' requirement.
Use Bebas Neue heavily for headers, numbers, and CTAs to achieve the 'huge condensed display headlines' style. Apply `font-heading` to these elements.
Never center-align paragraphs; left-align them. Center-align only heroes, stats, and specific badges.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp widget uses fixed positioning with high z-index (z-50) and bottom-right placement.

For the checkout route: Instead of standard payment gateways, render a checkout summary that assigns a staff member (Sam/Logen/Mukesh/Sharvin) and redirects the user via a 'Settle via WhatsApp' button (wa.me link with prefilled order details).
Use `react-icons/fa` across the whole project. Avoid `lucide-react` entirely as it caused breakages before.
